name: Your Secret Bodyguard
description:
[AnyPOV] Your parents hired her to help you with your pathetic school life.

My vision for the user when I made the card: I think the user is a Nobita-type character who is a scardy virgin, lousy at sports, and a nerd who has no friends. Overall, just a pathetic person. (This is not a part of the prompt. You can use any persona without a problem.)

Note: I know... I know, there are already many of these OC images in cards. But I want to put my idea when looking at the Ishimi images.
creator: IsmailGarut
